automation.refreshCadence: Daily at 07:00 KST via local agent runner
automation.buildCommand: npm run agent:run && npm run build

brief.headline: 0개의 Critical 신호와 OpenAI가 오늘의 흐름을 주도
brief.summary: 오늘 수집본은 34건이며, 이 중 0건이 즉시 확인이 필요한 high-signal 이슈다. 핵심 테마는 OpenAI, Coding, General AI, Anthropic 중심으로 모였다. 특히 OpenAI, Meta, GitHub, Anthropic, Apple 관련 노출이 많았다. 가장 최근 헤드라인은 Apple Is Suing OpenAI Because Hardware Is Still the Moat / Introducing Spark UI v1: An Open-Source React Component Registry with an Agent Skill / How to Build Your Own RAG Knowledge Base Q&A System with DeepSeek.
mustWatch: TechCrunch AI: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
The Verge AI: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
TechCrunch AI: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
TechCrunch AI: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
brief.editorNote: OpenAI 관련 뉴스가 가장 많이 잡혔고, 전체 흐름은 Product Update 중심으로 움직였다.
